arts.ttl: 'Wow': Craig Hope says he spotted Newcastle's Anthony Gordon do something concerning
arts.sum: Craig Hope has stated that he spotted Newcastle's Anthony Gordon's body language drop during the Fulham clash.

arts.ttl: Newcastle diehards show class with role in £34,000 AFC Wimbledon gesture after shock photos
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans have been among those generous supporters who have helped raise more than £34,000 for AFC Wimbledon to 'get games back on' at Plough Lane. Ahead of the game taking place, Graham Stacey, a former board member of the Dons Trust, the democratic supporters' organisation that owns AFC Wimbledon, has set up a Just Giving page to help the club and a whopping £34,505 has been raised so far following donations from 823 supporters.

arts.ttl: 'Devastating' truth about Wimbledon's Carabao Cup tie as 45% prize pot awaits and Newcastle thanked
arts.sum: Newcastle United have been thanked by AFC Wimbledon after throwing an arm of support around their lower league opponents following the Carabao Cup third round postponement. "It has been an immensely difficult day for club staff given the extent of the flooding, with related damage to our pitch and stadium.

arts.ttl: Would Alexander Isak be a perfect fit for PSG?
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain seem to have their sights set on adding a Premier League striker to their squad. Alexander Isak (25) signed a six-year contract with Newcastle United in August 2022,…

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's date with Wimbledon announced as Dons agree to St James' Park switch
arts.sum: A Wimbledon statement read: "Our Carabao Cup fixture against Newcastle United has been rearranged - to be held at St. James' Park, Newcastle, on Tuesday 1st October, kick off 7.45pm. "We will confirm ticket arrangements as soon as possible (including refund process for the original fixture), and we are actively working with local travel companies on coach travel for our supporters wishing to travel as we recognise this will be extremely difficult for supporters wishing to travel to support the Dons for this hugely anticipated fixture.

arts.ttl: Jamaal Lascelles' leadership role expained after Bruno appointed team captain at Newcastle
arts.sum: Newcastle United club skipper Jamaal Lascelles is still playing a "huge role" behind the scenes at the club's Benton base. Lascelles was ruled out for six to nine months back in April so is nearing the end of his long comeback from a serious knee injury.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon support more needed than ever after 'over the top' reaction
arts.sum: What Gordon needs is the support not just of Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe but of Toon fans too - those criticising would be best off reminding themselves of the impact Gordon had on last season and the danger he presented to many an opposition full-back. There are many reasons to why Gordon is failing to match his stats of last campaign - a lack of minutes for England during the Euros and the apparent interest of Liverpool may well have impacted him in the early weeks of the season.

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Man United team that blew Newcastle away 6-0 - featuring a hat-trick from a star man?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Howe 'reward' makes little sense as Newcastle boss receives clear Tonali message
arts.sum: But if Willock was handed such a prize for an impressive cameo in Newcastle United's win at Wolves, why hasn't Sandro Tonali started recent matches following his impressive return to competitive football? Instead, with Willock returning to play on the left of Newcastle's midfield three, Joelinton was moved to an unfamiliar role on the right, over Tonali, and struggled.

arts.ttl: Man City suffer major injury blow ahead of Newcastle United clash as update given
arts.sum: Manchester City will be without influential midfielder Rodri for the weekend’s Premier League clash against Newcastle United after he injured his knee against Arsenal. The injury meant that Rodri was expected to miss the game, but it is reported that he could be set for a significant lay-off.
